description: In the episode's denouement, Coulson meets Hunter at a bar after escaping the Playground. Hunter apologizes for his presumed absence and accepts Coulson's job offer, reaffirming his loyalty. Together, they commit to working as a team moving forward, while the state of S.H.I.E.L.D. remains uncertain.

transcript.line: That's a lot of umbrellas for one drink.
Let me guess... She got the house.
Two of whatever he's having. Sorry I'm late. An evacuation pod will wash up where and when it wants to. Maybe a couple of those little umbrellas if you have them. So, how have you been? Anything new?
Same old, same old. So, you finished your vacation?
Absolutely. You know, I never did understand the appeal of cruise ships. I almost forgot.
You offered me a permanent position. Consider that my contract. So, what's the plan, boss?
